productPerformance.title: Product Performance
productPerformance.description: Rank products by current-versus-prior revenue and lifecycle stage.

reason.new: First sale landed inside the current comparison window.
reason.end_of_life: No current-window revenue and the last sale was at least 6 complete months ago.
reason.declining: Current revenue fell below 80% of the prior comparison window.
reason.growing: Current revenue is at least 20% above the prior comparison window.
reason.mature: More than 24 months on sale with revenue holding near the prior window.
reason.stable: Current revenue remained positive without triggering another lifecycle rule.

productPerformance.empty: No qualifying products for this comparison window.

reorderPointAdmin.title: Reorder Point Calculator
reorderPointAdmin.description: Preview replenishment thresholds and suggested orders from demand history, then apply selected rows.
reorderPointAdmin.candidatesHint: {count} candidate rows · check rows to include in apply
reorderPointAdmin.noCandidatesHint: Run Preview to see candidate rows
reorderPointAdmin.noSkippedHint: Skipped rows were not eligible and will not be modified.
reorderPointAdmin.noCandidatesDesc: No products met eligibility criteria for the selected scope.
reorderPointAdmin.noSkippedDesc: All evaluated rows had sufficient data.
reorderPointAdmin.formula: ROP covers lead-time demand; suggested order compares target stock against inventory position (on hand + on order + in transit - reserved).
reorderPointAdmin.avgDailyUsageUnits: Avg daily usage = units per day
reorderPointAdmin.settingsInlineHint: Editing {{product}}. Review the {{warehouse}} warehouse card below.
reorderPointAdmin.rulesDemand: Only rows with usable demand history are considered for auto-calculation.
reorderPointAdmin.rulesLeadTime: Rows without history or a manual lead time now use the explicit 80-day operating default and are marked low confidence.
reorderPointAdmin.rulesApply: Nothing is saved until you explicitly select rows and apply them.
reorderPointAdmin.formulaInventoryBody: On hand + on order + in transit - reserved
reorderPointAdmin.leadTimePolicyBody: When a row has neither a manual lead time nor supplier receipt history, the calculator uses the explicit 80-day container replenishment default and labels it as an operating default.

summary.candidatesHint: Rows with usable demand and lead-time data.
summary.selectedHint: Batch update only touches checked rows.
summary.skippedHint: Rows blocked by missing inputs or low trust.
summary.leadTimeReviewHint: Rows that must be configured before auto-calc.
summary.businessDefaultHint: How many candidates currently rely on the {days}-day operating default lead time.

reorderPointAdmin.candidateToolbarHint: Click a row to inspect the calculation, then check the rows you want to apply.
reorderPointAdmin.rerunPreviewHint: Change the inputs and run Preview again. Rows without history lead time now use the operating default and are marked low confidence.
reorderPointAdmin.guidanceTitleNoCandidates: No rows are ready to apply yet
reorderPointAdmin.guidanceBodyNoCandidates: With the current {lookbackDays}-day window, {insufficientHistoryCount} rows still lack enough demand history and {leadTimeReviewCount} rows already have demand but are relying on the operating default lead time. First widen the lookback to inspect coverage, then decide whether to override the operating default for critical rows.
reorderPointAdmin.guidanceBodyMaxLookback: Even at the widest {lookbackDays}-day window, {insufficientHistoryCount} rows still do not reach two qualifying demand events: {zeroDemandCount} rows have zero events and {singleDemandCount} rows have only one. Another {leadTimeReviewCount} rows already have demand but are relying on the operating default lead time. Widening the time window further will not help much; the next step is to override lead time where needed or redefine the demand-event rule.
reorderPointAdmin.skippedToolbarHint: Skipped rows explain why auto-calculation stopped and what needs to be fixed first.
reorderPointAdmin.detailNoQualityNote: This row has enough data to compute a preview. Review the figures before batch apply.
reorderPointAdmin.detailEmptyDesc: Use the table to inspect one row at a time before deciding whether to apply it.

qualityMessage.leadTimeMissing: This row already has demand, but the current warehouse has neither a manual lead time nor usable supplier receipt history yet.
qualityMessage.businessDefault: This row currently uses the {days}-day operating default lead time. Override it when you have a better supplier or SKU-specific lead time.
qualityMessage.insufficientHistory: Only {count} qualifying sales/reservation events were found in the selected {days}-day window; at least 2 are required.
qualityMessage.sourceUnresolved: Recent receipts do not point to a single replenishment source yet.
qualityMessage.supplierDefault: Lead time currently relies on the supplier default instead of receipt history.
qualityMessage.lowConfidenceHistory: Lead time is based on {count} historical samples, so confidence is {confidence}.
qualityMessage.continuousPolicyFallback: No target stock is configured, so the suggested order only tops up to the reorder point.
qualityMessage.periodicPolicyFallback: Periodic replenishment still needs a planning horizon or target stock before it can suggest a fuller order cycle.

safetyFactorPopover.title: Safety Factor (安全係數)
safetyFactorPopover.body: Extra buffer stock multiplier applied to lead-time demand. A higher value means more conservative safety stock to protect against demand spikes or supplier delays.
safetyFactorPopover.formula: Safety Stock = Avg Daily Usage × Factor × Lead Time Days

alertPanel.title: Reorder Alerts
alertPanel.description: Low-stock exceptions for the current warehouse scope.

reorderSuggestionsPage.title: Reorder Suggestions
reorderSuggestionsPage.description: Review warehouse-aware replenishment recommendations and turn them into draft supplier orders.
reorderSuggestionsPage.listDescription: Suggestions reuse the same warehouse stock signals and supplier hints behind reorder alerts.
reorderSuggestionsPage.emptyDescription: The current warehouse scope does not have any products below their reorder threshold.
reorderSuggestionsPage.unresolvedDescription: These rows could not be grouped into draft orders automatically because the supplier hint is still unresolved.
reorderSuggestionsPage.manualDraftDescription: The draft order form is prefilled with the unresolved product, warehouse, and suggested quantity. Choose the supplier manually before saving.

countSessionsPage.title: Physical Count Sessions
countSessionsPage.description: Start warehouse count sessions and review submitted variances before reconciliation.
countSessionsPage.filtersDescription: Scope the list by warehouse and lifecycle status.
countSessionsPage.directoryDescription: Submitted sessions stay read-only until approval applies the stock reconciliation.
countSessionsPage.emptyDescription: Start a new warehouse count session to snapshot live stock for review.

countSessionDetailPage.title: Count Session {id}
countSessionDetailPage.description: Capture counted quantities, then submit and approve the warehouse reconciliation.
countSessionDetailPage.missingDescription: This count session could not be loaded.
countSessionDetailPage.summaryDescription: Approval only applies adjustments when live stock still matches the original snapshot.
countSessionDetailPage.linesDescriptionEditable: Update counted quantities line by line. Submission locks editing for review.
countSessionDetailPage.linesDescriptionReadonly: This session is locked. Review the recorded variances before or after reconciliation.
countSessionDetailPage.invalidQuantity: Enter a counted quantity greater than or equal to 0.
countSessionDetailPage.loadError: Failed to load the count session.

belowReorderReportPage.title: Below-Reorder Report
belowReorderReportPage.description: Preview and export stock rows that are currently below their warehouse reorder point.
belowReorderReportPage.previewDescription: The table preview and the CSV export use the same warehouse-filtered dataset.
belowReorderReportPage.emptyDescription: No products in the current warehouse scope are currently below their reorder point.

inventoryValuationPage.title: Inventory Valuation
inventoryValuationPage.description: Review warehouse-level inventory value with explicit cost-source metadata.
inventoryValuationPage.summaryDescription: The report keeps product rows, warehouse subtotals, and the grand total separate so warehouse balances stay explainable.
inventoryValuationPage.warehouseTotalsDescription: Each warehouse subtotal is calculated from the same row set shown below.
inventoryValuationPage.tableDescription: Missing-cost rows remain visible with zero extended value so cost gaps can be reviewed explicitly.
inventoryValuationPage.emptyDescription: No inventory rows exist in the current warehouse scope.

productGrid.name: Name
productGrid.browseProducts: Browse all products with current stock levels.

categoriesPage.title: Product Categories
categoriesPage.description: Manage the category master used in product forms and inventory search filters.
categoriesPage.formDescription: Create and maintain active category records without forcing historical product recategorization.
categoriesPage.directoryDescription: Search, review, and deactivate categories while preserving stored product category text.
categoriesPage.emptyDescription: Create a category to standardize product selection and search filters.
categoriesPage.readOnly: You can review categories here, but only inventory editors can make changes.

unitsPage.title: Units of Measure
unitsPage.description: Manage tenant-specific unit codes used in product forms while preserving historical product unit text.
unitsPage.formDescription: Create and maintain active unit codes that product forms can reuse without free-text drift.
unitsPage.directoryDescription: Search, review, and deactivate units while keeping stored product unit codes intact.
unitsPage.emptyDescription: Create a unit to standardize product selection and inventory master data.
unitsPage.readOnly: You can review units here, but only inventory editors can make changes.
unitsPage.decimalPlacesInvalid: Decimal places must be an integer between 0 and 6

adjustmentHistory.noHistoryDescription: No inventory adjustments have been recorded for this product.
adjustmentHistory.title: Adjustment History

productDetail.deactivateDescription: Inactive products stay in history and still reserve their code, but they disappear from default search and selectors.
productDetail.editDescription: Update code, name, category, description, and unit.

planningSupport.title: Planning Support
planningSupport.description: Shared sales history is advisory only and does not replace warehouse-level reorder rules.
planningSupport.emptyBody: Planning support appears after confirmed sales history is available for this product.

settingsTab.previewNote: Suggested order compares target stock against inventory position {{inventoryPosition}} (on hand {{currentStock}} + on order {{onOrderQty}} + in transit {{inTransitQty}} - reserved {{reservedQty}}).
settingsTab.manualPolicyPreview: Manual policy disables auto-calculated replenishment preview.
settingsTab.leadTimeRequiredPreview: Set a lead time before using the auto-calculated preview.
settingsTab.noDemandHistoryPreview: Demand history is still too thin to produce an auto-calculated preview.

suppliersPanel.title: Product Suppliers
suppliersPanel.description: Manage explicit supplier associations and the default supplier for this product.

detail.backorderCallout_one: Backorder risk remains on {count} line. Rebalance stock before shipping.
detail.backorderCallout_other: Backorder risk remains on {count} lines. Rebalance stock before shipping.
detail.billingNavigationDescription: Invoice access and collection posture stay visible without mixing with warehouse steps.
detail.billingPending: The invoice will appear here after the order is confirmed.
detail.commercialActionsDescription: Commit the order commercially or stop it before warehouse work begins.
detail.cancelOrderMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? This action cannot be undone.
detail.confirmOrderMessage: This will auto-generate an invoice for this order.
detail.commissionDescription: Commission allocations stay visible on the order without affecting confirmation or invoicing.
detail.createsInvoice: This will create the invoice and reserve stock.
detail.readOnlyActions: This order is read-only for your role. Sales and admin users can change its workflow state.
detail.adjustQuantities: Adjust quantities or replenish stock before trying again.
detail.lineItemsDescription: Products and services in this order.
detail.nextActionsDescription: Commercial, warehouse, and billing actions stay separated so the workflow is legible at a glance.
detail.noCommercialActions: No commercial action is available from the current state.
detail.noLineItemsDescription: This order has no line items.
detail.noWarehouseActions: Warehouse action becomes available after the order is committed.
detail.crmContextDescription: Carry forward quotation-origin context without moving invoice or reservation work ahead of confirmation.
detail.crmContextNote: This order still stays in the pending intake state. Invoice creation and stock reservation only happen when you confirm it.
detail.orderSummaryDescription: Key details and totals for this order.
detail.readyToShipCallout: This order is commercially committed, reserved, and ready for warehouse action.
detail.reservationCallout: Inventory reservation is incomplete. Recheck stock before shipping.

toast.confirmedDescription: Invoice {invoiceNumber} was created and stock was reserved.
toast.confirmedDescriptionFallback: Order {orderNumber} was confirmed and is ready for billing.
toast.fulfilledDescription: Order {orderNumber} is now marked as fulfilled.
toast.shippedDescription: Order {orderNumber} is now marked as shipped.

detail.warehouseActionsDescription: Move the order forward only when readiness, reservation, and backorder cues are clear.
detail.workflowTimelineDescription: Track the commercial, warehouse, and billing milestones without decoding overloaded status labels.

errors.allocatedPercentageMax: Allocated percentage must be 100% or less.
errors.allocatedPercentagePositive: Allocated percentage must be greater than zero.
errors.commissionRateMax: Commission rate must be 100% or less.
errors.customerRequired: Select a customer before creating the order.
errors.discountConflict: Discount amount and discount percent cannot both be greater than zero.
errors.discountPercentRange: Discount percent must be between 0 and 100.
errors.lineDescriptionTooLong: Line descriptions must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.lineQuantityPositive: Line quantity must be greater than zero.
errors.lineTaxPolicyRequired: Each line needs a tax policy.
errors.linesRequired: Add at least one order line.
errors.linesTooLarge: Orders can contain at most 200 lines.
errors.notesTooLong: Notes must be 2000 characters or fewer.
errors.salesPersonRequired: Each sales rep row needs a name.
errors.salesPersonTooLong: Sales rep names must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.salesTeamTooLarge: Sales team allocation supports up to 10 reps.
errors.utmCampaignTooLong: UTM campaign must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.utmContentTooLong: UTM content must be 200 characters or fewer.
errors.utmMediumTooLong: UTM medium must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.utmSourceTooLong: UTM source must be 120 characters or fewer.

form.attributionDescription: Review or override the order attribution that will stay attached to downstream revenue.
form.attributionInherited: This order inherited its attribution from the source quotation. Editing these fields will create a visible manual override.
form.attributionOverrideHint: This order already contains a manual attribution override. Update the values here if the commercial review changes again.
form.commissionDescription: Optional sales-team splits are calculated on the pre-tax merchandise subtotal.
form.commissionEmpty: No commission split yet. Add a sales rep only when the order needs attribution.
form.newOrderDescription: Create a new sales order for your customer.
form.quotationLoadError: Quotation handoff could not be loaded.
form.quotationLoading: Load the quotation handoff before entering the pending order intake flow.
form.readOnly: You can review orders here, but only sales and admin users can create or update them.
form.preselectedCustomer: Customer context: this customer is preselected and the order will stay pending until you confirm it.
form.preselectedQuotation: Quoted commercial context: {partyLabel} ({quotationId}) is prefilled and linked to this pending order draft.
form.confirmationBoundary: Invoice creation and stock reservation still wait for order confirmation.
form.salesTeamIncomplete: Complete each sales rep row with a name and allocated percentage before submitting.

list.adjustFilter: Adjust the search or filter criteria and try again.
list.description: Browse and manage your sales orders.
